mapper.insert: INSERT INTO course (cid, tid, cname, cdate, cnum, invite, archive) VALUES (#{cid}, #{tid}, #{cname}, #{cdate}, #{cnum}, #{invite}, #{archive})
mapper.update: UPDATE course SET cname = #{cname}, cdate = #{cdate} WHERE cid = #{cid}
UPDATE course SET archive = 2 WHERE cid = #{cid}
UPDATE course SET archive = #{archive} WHERE cid = #{cid}
UPDATE course SET cname = #{name} WHERE cid = #{id}
UPDATE course SET cnum = cnum + 1 WHERE cid = #{cid}
UPDATE course SET cnum = cnum - 1 WHERE cid = #{cid}
mapper.select: SELECT course.cid, tc.tcid, course.cname, course.invite, course.cdate, course.tid, teacher.tname, teacher.tphone FROM tc LEFT JOIN course ON tc.cid = course.cid LEFT JOIN teacher ON course.tid = teacher.tid WHERE tc.tid = #{tid} AND tc.tarchive = 0 AND course.archive = 0 ORDER BY tc.tsort

SELECT course.cid, sc.scid, course.cname, course.invite, course.cdate, course.tid, teacher.tname, teacher.tphone FROM sc LEFT JOIN course ON sc.cid = course.cid LEFT JOIN teacher ON course.tid = teacher.tid WHERE sc.sid = #{sid} AND sc.sarchive = 0 AND course.archive = 0 ORDER BY sc.sort
SELECT teacher.timage AS image, teacher.tname, teacher.tid, teacher.tphone, tc.job FROM tc LEFT JOIN teacher ON teacher.tid = tc.tid WHERE tc.cid = #{cid}
SELECT student.simage AS image, student.sname, student.sid, student.semail, student.snum, sc.scid FROM sc LEFT JOIN student ON student.sid = sc.sid WHERE sc.cid = #{cid}

SELECT student.sid, student.sname, student.snum, ts.allsum FROM student, sc LEFT JOIN ( SELECT swork.sid, SUM(twork.scale * swork.score) AS allsum FROM twork, swork WHERE twork.cid = #{cid} AND twork.twid = swork.twid GROUP BY swork.sid, twork.scale, swork.score ) AS ts ON sc.sid = ts.sid WHERE sc.cid = #{cid} AND student.sid = sc.sid
